index.name: Official website homepage
index.description: The homepage template displays the basic information and functions of the product document library

hero_image_url.label: Background image
hero_image_url.info: The background image will be automatically cropped based on the page width and background height

hero_bg_color.label: background color
hero_bg_color.info: The color of the first screen background style will be processed based on the selected color value (color background)

hero_slogan.label: slogan
hero_slogan.info: The slogan will be displayed above the background image

search_hot_keywords.label: HOT
search_hot_keywords.info: After setting, popular searches will be displayed below the search box. Set multiple keywords for line breaks

directify_page.name: Page
directify_page.description: Product, company, or project page template

product_index.name: Product Document Classification Template
product_index.description: Used to distinguish different product documents

icon.label: Document classification icon
icon.info: Used for displaying icons on homepage, category search, and other locations

thumb_image_url.label: Beautify thumbnail in product documentation page

content_type.label: Input method for detailed description of product documentation

version_index.name: Different version templates under product documentation
version_index.description: Used to distinguish different product document versions; For example: v1.0, v2.0, etc

index_preview.name: Demo homepage
index_preview.description: Demo homepage template, showcasing the basic information and functions of the product documentation library

theme_description: Use for building data libraries, catalogs, and knowledge bases.

logo_url.label: Bright Logo Image
logo_url.info: Suggested size for website bright color logo is 300x80

dark_logo_url.label: Dark Logo Image
dark_logo_url.info: Suggested size for website dark logo is 300x80

contact_info.label: Contact address/phone number
contact_info.info: Multi line text, can be filled in with contact address, phone number and other information

header_menu_html.label: Top navigation bar
header_menu_html.info: Head HTML configuration, navigation bar link can be filled in

footer.title: At the bottom of the website

footer_bg_color.label: Bottom background color
footer_bg_color.info: Suggest using a dark background, such as # 181a2a

footer_text_color.label: Bottom text color
footer_text_color.info: Suggest using light colored text, such as # e5e7eb

footer_description.label: description
footer_description.info: For example, a sentence describing the philosophy of a company or product

copyright.label: Copyright Information
copyright.info: For example: Copyright owned by a certain company

nav_links.label: Bottom navigation bar
nav_links.info: Multi line text, navigation bar link can be filled in
